title: Indulging Smoky Irish Sea Bass Salad
description: Citrusy, aerated, meal-prep Irish dish featuring smoked sea bass, bright orange segments, arugula, and a light citrus dressing served in an agave leaf bowl.
instructions: Warm the smoked sea bass fillet in a microwave or on a low heat until just heated, about 1 minute, then dice into bite-size cubes.
While the fish heats, combine the orange segments, cucumber, and avocado in a bowl.
Add the arugula and microgreens to the fruit and vegetables, tossing gently.
Whisk together olive oil, lemon juice, white wine vinegar, smoked paprika, salt, and pepper in a small bowl to create the citrus dressing.
Pour the dressing over the salad and toss until everything is evenly coated.
Divide the salad into agave leaf vessels, placing a generous portion of sea bass cubes on top of the greens.
Garnish each vessel with toasted almond slivers and a sprig of fresh mint if desired.
Seal the agave leaf vessel with a small piece of parchment and refrigerate for up to 4 hours before serving.
